Lumify
Table of Contents

Class NoteAttachment

Namespace
lumify.api.Models.EF
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

A file attached to a note. Stores the upload metadata and the name under which the file is stored on disk. Soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

public class NoteAttachment
Inheritance
object
NoteAttachment

Properties

ContentType

The file's MIME content type.

public string ContentType { get; set; }

Property Value

string

CreatedAt

Creation timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string CreatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

DeletedAt

Soft-delete timestamp (ISO-8601 string); null while active.

public string? DeletedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

FileSize

The file size in bytes.

public int FileSize { get; set; }

Property Value

int

ID

Primary key (GUID string).

public string ID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Note

The parent note.

public virtual Note Note { get; set; }

Property Value

Note

NoteID

The note this attachment belongs to.

public string NoteID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

OriginalFileName

The file name as uploaded by the user.

public string OriginalFileName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Owner

The uploading user.

public virtual User Owner { get; set; }

Property Value

User

OwnerID

The user who uploaded the attachment.

public string OwnerID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

StoredFileName

The (safe, unique) name under which the file is stored on disk.

public string StoredFileName { get; set; }

Property Value

string
